ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the post belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Main content of the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was last updated */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post has received */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views on the post */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is pinned */,
  "reported" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post has been reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "text" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "reported" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief bio of the user */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the forum */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, moderator, member) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "can_edit_posts" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can edit posts */,
  "can_delete_posts" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can delete posts */,
  "can_edit_comments" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can edit comments */,
  "can_delete_comments" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can delete comments */,
  "can_manage_users" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can manage user accounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Status indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., comment, like, report) */,
  "related_post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related post (if applicable) */,
  "related_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related comment (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_related_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_related_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like event */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that has been liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the post */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the like was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the like is still active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_follows" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow event */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "following_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the follow was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_follows_follower_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_follows_following_id FOREIGN KEY ("following_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report event */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the post */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_reports_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report event */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the comment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_reports_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
